paper_title: Context-Aware RL for Agentic and Multimodal LLMs

C1.1.summary: 开源模型在标准基准上表现出色，但在对比上下文选择测试中接近随机水平，表明强基准性能可能掩盖了上下文 grounding 的失败

evidence.quote_text: notably, strong open-source models such as Qwen-3 (VL) 8B and Qwen-3.5 9B perform close to random choice, despite their competitive performance on standard benchmarks
this simple test reveals a roughly 40-point gap between proprietary models and widely used open-source models

C2.1.summary: 通过级联过滤（同一仓库、提交、文件、函数/类、相关但不同问题）可以构建几乎 token 级别相同的对比轨迹对

evidence.quote_text: Paired trajectories share the same repository, commit, modified file, and target function or class... the two contexts are therefore nearly identical at the token level
only 1k high-quality contrastive trajectory pairs survive, i.e. 1.5% of the 66k source trajectories

C2.2.summary: 生成式编辑和相似度检索可以构建高质量的对比图像对，总计 7k 对

evidence.quote_text: This yields approximately 700 high-quality pairs from 2k candidates, a ~65% rejection rate
This yields 6,300 high-quality pairs from over 200k candidates
The final multimodal training set contains 7k contrast image pairs, combining both strategies

C3.1.summary: 上下文感知损失 ℒCA 是 modality-agnostic 的，统一适用于 agentic 轨迹和图像

evidence.quote_text: Importantly, the loss is modality-agnostic and applies uniformly to agent trajectories and images

C3.2.summary: GRPO 优化正确输出，ℒCA 强制执行输出与其支持上下文之间的对齐，两个目标互补

evidence.quote_text: The two objectives are complementary. GRPO optimizes for correct outputs, while ℒCA enforces alignment between outputs and their supporting context

C5.1.summary: ContextRL 在每个基准和两个基础模型上始终优于 RL baseline

evidence.quote_text: ContextRL improves over the RL baseline on every benchmark and for both base models
ContextRL achieves average gains of +2.2% over standard GRPO on 5 long-horizon benchmarks

C5.2.summary: 基于 Klear-AgentForge-8B 的 ContextRL 在 SWE-Bench 上大幅优于 4× 更大的 Qwen3-32B 和代码专用 Qwen3-Coder-30B

evidence.quote_text: When trained from Klear-AgentForge-8B, ContextRL substantially outperforms Qwen3-32B (4× larger) and the code-specialized Qwen3-Coder-30B on SWE-Bench

C5.3.summary: 在 OOD 长上下文任务上，标准 outcome-based GRPO 退步而 ContextRL 进步

evidence.quote_text: On NIAH, standard outcome-based GRPO regresses relative to the base model, whereas ContextRL surpasses the base in both cases
This pattern indicates that the learned signal transfers beyond the agentic training domain and captures a more general notion of context grounding

C5.4.summary: ContextRL 在所有 12 个多模态基准和两个基础模型上全面优于 RL baseline

evidence.quote_text: ContextRL achieves the best performance across all sub-categories, surpassing both the RL baseline and strong reference methods like PAPO
ContextRL improves over standard GRPO by +2.0% on Qwen2.5-VL-7B and +1.6% on Qwen3-VL-8B, on average
ContextRL improves average performance by +2.0 points on Qwen2.5-VL and +1.6 points on Qwen3-VL, while improving every benchmark individually

C5.5.summary: ContextRL 的改进幅度超过专门为多模态感知设计的方法 PAPO

evidence.quote_text: on Qwen2.5-VL, ContextRL improves over the RL baseline by +2.0 on average: more than the +0.8 of PAPO, a method purpose-built for multimodal perception

C5.6.summary: 增益来自训练目标而非对比数据本身

evidence.quote_text: These results show that a single context-selection objective improves both long-horizon reasoning and multimodal understanding, without architectural changes or large-scale human annotation
These baselines provide little to no improvement, showing that the gains arise from the proposed context-selection objective rather than from the contrastive data alone

C5.7.summary: DA-SFT 学到上下文选择但损害策略，agentic 下导致灾难性崩溃；DA-RL 与 RL baseline 几乎无差异

evidence.quote_text: DA-SFT leads to catastrophic policy collapse: on Klear-AgentForge-8B, performance drops from 28.0 / 21.7 under the RL baseline to 6.4 / 1.3, and on Qwen3-8B the model collapses to 0.00 / 0.00
DA-RL is nearly indistinguishable from the RL baseline on both models

C5.8.summary: ContextRL 通过 GRPO 的受限更新（重要性比率裁剪 + KL 正则化）和密集辅助信号（ℒCA 在每个实例上直接监督相对偏好）避免 DA-SFT 和 DA-RL 的失败模式

evidence.quote_text: The GRPO importance-ratio clipping term clip(ρ_t^(i), 1-ε, 1+ε) and KL regularization keep the policy close to the reference model
Unlike DA-RL's sparse {0,1} rewards, ℒCA directly supervises the relative preference between C+ and C- on every example

C6.1.summary: Agentic 设置中 λ=0.005 达到最佳性能

evidence.quote_text: performance peaks at λ=0.005. At λ=0.001, the resolve rate is indistinguishable from the RL baseline... At λ=0.01, the score drops below even the RL baseline

C6.2.summary: 多模态设置中 15% 对比数据比例达到最佳平衡

evidence.quote_text: Increasing the contrastive proportion from 5% to 15% generally improves performance... at 50%, nearly all benchmarks are at or below the 5% level

C6.3.summary: 多模态设置中最大响应长度 4096 提供最佳平均性能

evidence.quote_text: Max length 4096 offers the best average performance across all benchmarks
